description:
3 HUGE THINGS you need to grasp when starting AFK Journey as a New Player! A quick AFK Journey New Player Guide Character Factions & Classes explained, Team compositions, and most importantly the HALL OF RESONANCE! 

Download link is here: https://bit.ly/Necrodrakon
Redemption Code: AFKJourneyCreator
